title: Enovix Q1 2026 Earnings: Key Highlights from Call
text: Financial Performance: Enovix reported $7.6 million in revenue, up 49% year-over-year, exceeding guidance. The company achieved a non-GAAP gross margin of 26.3%, marking six consecutive quarters of positive gross profit. Non-GAAP net loss per share came in at $0.14, better than expected. Smart Eyewear Progress: The company commenced commercial production of its A1 battery for a lead customer's reference platform. Management targets 50,000 units for delivery in 2026 and forecasts production scaling to millions in 2027. Smartphone Qualification Breakthrough: Enovix aligned with Honor and a second OEM on new testing protocols. The companies agreed to replace the legacy 0.7 C discharge test with a 0.2 C protocol that better reflects real-world usage, removing what management called a gating item for silicon anode battery adoption. Drone and Defense Expansion: The Korean manufacturing pipeline now exceeds $130 million, with over 60% from drone opportunities. The newly launched MX1B01 drone cell delivers 360 Wh/kg energy density.
